SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.username, p.full_name
FROM profile p
WHERE p.biography_lexemes @@ to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & restaurant')
ORDER BY ts_rank(p.biography_lexemes, to_tsquery('english', 'healthy & restaurant')) DESC
LIMIT 10;
